attacking_style: Insufficient data to establish attacking pattern. Single observation shows presence in early breakaways capable of securing KOM jersey, but lacks evidence of sustained climbing ability.
team_tactics: Appears deployed in early breakaway work, possibly for KOM competition or visibility. Team support details not observable from available data.
terrain_preference: Unable to determine clear preference. Struggles evident on repeated climbs (Mont Brouilly), suggesting limited effectiveness on multi-climb stages.
vulnerability: Accumulated fatigue from early-race efforts; spectacularly cracked on first Mont Brouilly ascent despite holding KOM jersey, indicating inability to defend on harder climbs after breakaway work.
key_patterns: Cracked dramatically when holding KOM jersey under sustained climbing pressure (1 instance)
form_trajectory: negative: visible fatigue accumulation leading to complete failure on categorized climb while in race lead jersey
